title: triniella frigida
intro: Triniella frigida, also known as 'Mountain Triniella', is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of the Americas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triniella frigida include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, and alleviating digestive problems like diarrhea. The herbal preparations of Triniella frigida typically involve infusions or decoctions of its leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form to harness its medicinal benefits.
